plan_summary.plan_name: Arla 'Crate Escape' Milk-Crate Recovery (Pioneer Aggressive Volume)
plan_summary.primary_goal: Recover at least 108,000 lost Arla milk crates (40% of annual loss) across Denmark in 2026 under the Pioneer Aggressive Volume strategy on a DKK 4M budget, with ≥DKK 500K to Arla Foundation and ≥20M organic social-media impressions.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the crate-recovery volume margin against the 108,000-unit Year-1 target; the budget surplus against bottom-up program spend; the donation margin against the DKK 500K floor; the social-impressions margin against the 20M organic threshold; and the per-crate handling-cost margin against the DKK 10 channel-review trigger. Supermarket-partner irreverent-marketing signoff, municipal liability MoU execution, and third-party food-grade cleaning capacity are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Program budget ceiling
key_values.comment: Hard DKK 4M ceiling covering donation pool (DKK 1.35M), reverse logistics (DKK 1.65M), and marketing (DKK 1.0M); overrun forces premature campaign halt per Risk 1.
key_values.source_text: Total program budget ceiling of 4 million DKK — maximum expenditure allocation.

key_values.label: Year-1 crate recovery target
key_values.comment: 40% of the 270,000-unit annual loss volume; the primary viability metric of the Pioneer strategy and the basis for the 2027 production-reduction claim.
key_values.source_text: Year one target recovery volume of 108,000 crates — derived annual return goal.

key_values.label: Minimum Arla Foundation donation floor
key_values.comment: Below DKK 500K to Arla Foundation the charitable-impact success metric fails and the CSR narrative collapses regardless of volume achieved.
key_values.source_text: Minimum success criteria for donation of 500,000 DKK — financial threshold.

key_values.label: Organic social-media impressions target
key_values.comment: 20 million organic impressions justify the irreverent marketing posture (Decision 5 Choice 2); below this the reputational risk to supermarket partners is not earned back.
key_values.source_text: If organic social media impressions fall below 20 million, the virality goal is not achieved.

key_values.label: Per-crate handling cost channel-review trigger
key_values.comment: Risk 8 names DKK 10/crate as the channel-prioritization review trigger; above this logistics consumes >60% of the non-donation envelope and the economic-viability case collapses.
key_values.source_text: If per-crate handling cost exceeds 10 DKK, revise Channel Prioritization (Decision 2) pre-Q3 rollout.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved crate recovery volume in 2026
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 108,000-unit Year-1 target clears; Risk 1 names the 5 DKK incentive triggering >216,000 returns which exhausts the donation budget; the inverse risk (low engagement) misses 40%.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Funnel from Q2 pilot pull-through × supermarket/municipal channel mix × tiered-incentive deceleration policy; sensitivity to Risk 7 consumer-fatigue post-Q3.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved total program spend across all components
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the DKK 4M envelope holds against donation outlay + logistics + marketing + contingency; Risk 8 names a >60% logistics share (DKK 1.59M) as the channel-prioritization trigger.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: actual_crate_recovery_units × DKK 5 incentive + per-crate handling × volume + marketing fixed + IT tracking; sensitivity to Risk 1 budget-exhaustion scenario.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Arla Foundation donation
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the DKK 500K floor the charitable-impact success metric fails; donation = min(volume × incentive, donation pool ceiling DKK 1.35M).
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: actual_crate_recovery_units × per-crate incentive (decelerating from DKK 5 to DKK 3 if pilot >40K units per Decision 1 Choice 2); cap at DKK 1.35M donation pool.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved organic social-media impressions
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 20M virality target clears; Risk 3 names a 50% impression drop if the irreverent marketing alienates partners or public.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Project from Q1 creative pre-tests + organic reach benchmarks for Danish CSR campaigns + irreverent-tone-amplification factor; sensitivity to Risk 3 partner-alienation scenario.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved per-crate handling cost across collection-cleaning-redistribution
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Q1 Assumption flags DKK 15/crate as the 30%-overrun trigger; the Decision-2 channel-prioritization review activates at DKK 10/crate per Risk 8.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: transport per pickup + third-party food-grade washing + quality inspection FTE / weekly throughput; sensitivity to centralized-hub bottleneck (Risk 2) and grading-protocol inconsistency (Risk 5).

recommended_first_calculations.label: Crate-recovery volume margin against the 108,000-unit target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin clears the 40%-recovery success metric and supports the 2027 production-reduction claim; negative margin invalidates the Pioneer strategy thesis and the environmental rationale.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Program budget surplus against the DKK 4M ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus preserves residual funds for Decision-15 Q1-2027 habit-bridging; negative surplus triggers premature campaign halt per Risk 1 budget-exhaustion path.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Arla Foundation donation margin against the DKK 500K floor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin secures the charitable-impact success metric; negative margin invalidates the CSR narrative regardless of volume or impressions achieved.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Social-impressions margin against the 20M virality target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin earns back the irreverent-marketing posture risk; negative margin means the Risk-3 reputational exposure was incurred without virality compensation.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Per-crate handling-cost margin against the DKK 10 channel-review trigger
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps logistics within the non-donation envelope; negative margin triggers the Decision-2 channel-prioritization review and the Risk-8 economic-viability collapse path.

unmodelled_gates.label: Salling Group, Coop Danmark, and Rema 1000 sign off on irreverent marketing creatives
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 3 names supermarket-partner alienation as the binary reputational hinge; without retailer signoff the entire dual-channel collection model collapses regardless of consumer demand for the 5 DKK incentive.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Supermarkets reduce support; 50% reduction in organic impressions per Risk 3; DKK 500K marketing-cost increase needed to backfill virality; dual-channel collection collapses to municipal-only.

unmodelled_gates.label: ≥50% of Tier-1 municipalities sign liability-transfer MoUs by end of Q1 2026
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Decision 12 routes triage liability to municipal waste authorities under signed MoU; without Q1 signoff Risk 4 caps Q3 rollout capacity below the 108K target regardless of supermarket-channel performance.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Municipal channel curtailed for Q3 rollout; capacity caps the 108K target per Risk 4; legal exposure for ambiguous-crate triage falls back onto Arla.

unmodelled_gates.label: Third-party food-grade washing facilities deliver ≥7,000 crates/week throughput
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 2 names cleaning-hub bottleneck as High/High; below 7K/week the 2027 production-reduction metric fails regardless of how many crates are collected, because crates can't return to circulation.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Throughput stall of 4–8 weeks per Risk 2 sensitivity; 2027 new-crate production reduction target fails; recovered crates accumulate as backlog inventory.
